Name: FSectionEvaluationData
Description: Evaluation data that specifies information about what to evaluate for a given template

Variables.Name: ImplIndex
Variables.Description: The implementation index we should evaluate (index into FMovieSceneEvaluationTrack::ChildTemplates)

Variables.Name: ForcedTime
Variables.Description: A forced time to evaluate this section at

Variables.Name: Flags
Variables.Description: Additional flags for evaluating this section
